title: Design water treatment systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design water treatment systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine design requirements

pcs.text: Determine the quality of water to be treated and level of treatment required to meet water treatment system quality requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the quality of water to be treated and level of treatment required to meet water treatment system quality requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the quality of water to be treated and level of treatment required to meet water treatment system quality requirements.

pcs.text: Develop construction specifications that define the work required to treat water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop construction specifications that define the work required to treat water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop construction specifications that define the work required to treat water.

pcs.text: Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations.

pcs.text: Document design calculations and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document design calculations and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document design calculations and requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine design requirements

elements.title: Determine pumping and power system requirements

pcs.text: Identify and select pumps that can treat water efficiently and at the flow and the pressure required to operate the distribution system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select pumps that can treat water efficiently and at the flow and the pressure required to operate the distribution system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select pumps that can treat water efficiently and at the flow and the pressure required to operate the distribution system.

pcs.text: Select pump and pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select pump and pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select pump and pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application.

pcs.text: Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines, and check with local authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines, and check with local authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines, and check with local authorities.

pcs.text: Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs, and compare energy sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs, and compare energy sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs, and compare energy sources.

pcs.text: Select structures, valves and accessories and integrate into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select structures, valves and accessories and integrate into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select structures, valves and accessories and integrate into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained.

pcs.text: Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions.

pcs.text: Design construction specifications that define the work required to make a suitable pumping and power system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design construction specifications that define the work required to make a suitable pumping and power system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design construction specifications that define the work required to make a suitable pumping and power system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine pumping and power system requirements

elements.title: Design a water treatment system

pcs.text: Evaluate treatment systems and design with respect to a range of key variables
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate treatment systems and design with respect to a range of key variables?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate treatment systems and design with respect to a range of key variables.

pcs.text: Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life.

pcs.text: Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance.

pcs.text: Confirm that flows, water levels and pressures are achievable by the pumps operating at optimum efficiency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that flows, water levels and pressures are achievable by the pumps operating at optimum efficiency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that flows, water levels and pressures are achievable by the pumps operating at optimum efficiency.

pcs.text: Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure in system design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure in system design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure in system design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Design a water treatment system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate labour requirements based upon documented work schedule with reasonable allowance for variances in work schedules.

pcs.text: Base costing attributed to each component on quoted information from suppliers, or sound analysis of individual elements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Base costing attributed to each component on quoted information from suppliers, or sound analysis of individual elements.

pcs.text: Confirm design and capital expense budget output with an appropriately experienced and qualified person

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm design and capital expense budget output with an appropriately experienced and qualified person.

elements.title: Determine operating expense budget

pcs.text: Calculate an operating expense budget that includes all expenses applicable to the completed system

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of estimate labour requirements based upon documented work schedule with reasonable allowance for variances in work schedules
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate labour requirements based upon documented work schedule with reasonable allowance for variances in work schedules.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
